title: Bulk User Group Membership Request Schema
description: Request body for POST /admin/users/bulk-add-to-group and POST /admin/users/bulk-remove-from-group. One schema for both: the shape is identical and only the verb differs, so a second copy would be duplication. Both are idempotent (already-a-member on add, and not-a-member on remove, are successes) and both reject unknown group_ids with 400 for the whole request (a caller bug, not a per-user outcome).

user_ids.description: IDs of the users whose group membership changes

group_ids.description: IDs of the groups to add the users to / remove them from
